closed_last_30d.closure_note: 418 issues closed; ~300 driven by automated inactive-label sweep. 247 PRs merged or closed — extremely active merge week with v2 chat-page carve series landing.

p1_note: No P1/critical priority labels exist in this repo. Uses type-based classification (Bug/Feature) without priority tiers.

notable_open_bugs.title: [Bug]: MCP Tool Messages Are Removed From Conversation Context In Subsequent Turns
notable_open_bugs.priority_note: High-impact MCP context loss affecting multi-turn agent sessions

notable_open_bugs.title: [Bug]: Deleting agent messages in Cherry Studio UI does not remove them from Claude Code SDK .jsonl transcript
notable_open_bugs.priority_note: Agent message sync issue between UI and SDK layer

notable_open_bugs.title: [Bug]: Startup recovery re-dispatches a retry job already running in the current process
notable_open_bugs.priority_note: Job scheduling correctness bug in startup recovery path

notable_open_bugs.title: [Bug]: CherryClaw/OpenClaw agents ignore custom Provider LM Studio port, hardcode default port 1234
notable_open_bugs.priority_note: Agent provider configuration not respected — affects LM Studio users

notable_open_bugs.title: {{time}}/{{datetime}} system-prompt variables bust the Anthropic prompt cache
notable_open_bugs.priority_note: Second-level time variables invalidate prompt cache on every request — cost impact for Anthropic users
